subject: Fermi  trigger No 675411172: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:

MASTER-OAFA robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in Argentina (OAFA observatory of San Juan National University) started inspect of the Fermi GRB220528.26 (trigger No 675411172,20h 44m 50.40s , +24d 18m 00.0s, R=4.91) errorbox  311 sec after notice time and 345 sec after trigger time at 2022-05-28 06:18:32 UT, with upper limit up to  17.8 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 64 deg. The sun  altitude  is -64.3 deg. 

MASTER-OAGH robotic telescope  located in Mexico (OAGH National Institute for Astrophysics, Optics and Electronics) started inspect of the Fermi GRB220528.26 errorbox  447 sec after notice time and 481 sec after trigger time at 2022-05-28 06:20:49 UT, with upper limit up to  19.1 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 70 deg. The sun  altitude  is -35.9 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -12 deg., longitude l = 68 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=1988403

We obtain a following upper limits.
